case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. JORDANO LOPES FROTA PEREIRA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-16-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-16-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC., REPRESENTED BG JHONATTAN HERRADA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT JORDANO LOPEX FROTA PERIERA DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $863.73 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PEREIRA, JORDANO LOPES FROTA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-16-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-16-2018 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 55.00 - SERVED SEP-22-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PEREIRA, JORDANO LOPES FROTA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEREIRA, JORDANO LOPES FROTA $750.22 PRINCIPAL, $106.42 INTEREST, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $941.64, PRINCIPAL OF 736.22 PLUS PREJUDGMENT INTEREST PLUS ONE LATE FEE AND COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PEREIRA, JORDANO LOPES FROTA
